strengths: Strong background in backend engineering and distributed systems, including building low-latency microservices handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Demonstrated commitment to engineering best practices, emphasizing TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development across multiple roles.
Extensive 15+ year track record as an adaptable individual contributor across web, mobile, and embedded systems, including open-source platform development.
concerns: Completely lacks the required 5+ years of senior technical leadership and executive-level experience, having operated exclusively as an individual contributor (Senior/Staff Developer).
Does not meet the hard requirement of production experience operating multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes environments; his AI experience is limited to recent developer tooling contributions.
Shows no evidence of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, developing internal technical leadership, or governing outsourced delivery partners.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced individual contributor and 'software craftsman', but he represents an exceptionally weak fit for an executive CTO role. The position explicitly requires a leader who has scaled engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people and architected complex, production-grade multi-agent AI systems for real-time financial decision-making. Bogdan lacks both organizational leadership experience and commercial AI-native fintech background, possessing only recent exposure to AI developer tooling and no track record of managing managers, external delivery partners, or executive-level technical strategy.
